body:
Hey @lmuseau, could you recreate what you currently have in a sandbox? I'm not sure I understand what the problem is. Is there an issue with rendering when the hits are equal but the refinement not yet taken in account?

Note that comparing on the length alone is not a good idea, as two different queries likely have the same length, if there is more than one page.

Hey @lmuseau! Any updates on this?

You can use [this sandbox](https://codesandbox.io/s/github/algolia/doc-code-samples/tree/master/React%20InstantSearch/getting-started) to create a reproducible. This will help us pinpoint what exactly is going wrong.
